results.title: XRP rallies 10% as US–Iran peace deal boosts risk appetite
results.description: Key takeaways Ripple’s XRP is up nearly 11%, making it the second-best performer among the top 10 cryptocurrencies. The coin could extend its rally past the $1.366 resistance level. XRP approaches $1.30 Cryptocurrency markets remained broadly higher on Monday, with Bitcoin (BTC) leading gains as it climbed above the $66,000 mark.
